caption: A man with a grey, spiked wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a room decorated with numerous framed photographs on the walls. He is wearing a white button-down shirt with a small red bowtie and tan suspenders. A professional black microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. To the left and right of the man, logos are visible on the screen: one reads "PODCAST" below a graphic and the text "STUDIO," while the other says "GOSS TALK JOY" with "LIFESTYLE ENTERTAINMENT" in smaller text underneath. In the background, a mannequin torso wears a white garment, and a yellow sign with the word "LEE" is partially visible. Across the sequence, the man remains seated and speaks, his mouth moving and his head shifting slightly as he talks, while the background and equipment remain static.
